title: SG Unlimited Trades
description: A simple mod to reset trades when open the gui of a villager
body: ![Unlimited trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fc1b30ae071e54d47a32a698af92e3e969e9d00_0.webp)When a villager runs out of "stock" after tradding with it, you can just close the trade interface and reopen it and then the trades will be reseted so you don't longer need to wait until the villager restock its trades. This helps to prevent lag since you don't need to have a trading hall with tons of villager, now just one is enough.
